description: Phase 2: Context-Aware Query Generation - Extract project context (README, languages, frameworks, runtime, dependencies, session logs) for smarter skill recommendations without duplicates

userStories.title: Create extractors directory and ProjectContext type
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to set up the extractors module structure and define the ProjectContext interface.
acceptanceCriteria: Add ProjectContext interface to src/skill-recommendation/types.ts with 6 fields: readmeSummary, languages, frameworks, runtimes, existingPackages, recentSessionThemes
All fields have proper TypeScript types

userStories.title: Implement README Parser extractor
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to extract project summary from README.md file.
acceptanceCriteria: Parse README.md and extract title and description (first paragraph)
Return fallback to package.json description if README missing

userStories.title: Implement Language Detector extractor
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to detect language breakdown in repository.
acceptanceCriteria: Scan repository and detect languages by file extension
Handle large repositories efficiently (sample if needed)

userStories.title: Implement Framework Detector extractor
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to detect frameworks from dependencies.
acceptanceCriteria: Parse package.json, pyproject.toml, go.mod, Cargo.toml to find frameworks
Return array of detected frameworks: React, Vue, Angular, Express, Django, FastAPI, Flask, etc.

userStories.title: Implement Runtime Detector extractor
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to detect runtime environment.
acceptanceCriteria: Detect runtimes: Node.js, Python, Bun, Deno, Go, Ruby, Rust from config files
Return object with runtimes array and packageManagers array
Check for: package.json, .python-version, go.mod, Gemfile, Cargo.toml, deno.json

userStories.title: Implement Dependency Parser extractor
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to get list of existing packages to avoid duplicates.
acceptanceCriteria: Parse package.json (npm), pyproject.toml (pip), Gemfile (gem), Cargo.toml (cargo), go.mod (go)
Return flat array of package names from dependencies + devDependencies

userStories.title: Implement Session Log Extractor
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to extract recent work themes from Claude Code session logs.
acceptanceCriteria: Read last 5 session logs from ~/.claude/logs/ (JSONL format)
Extract user messages for keywords: test, react, database, auth, API, deploy, performance, etc.
Extract tool usage from assistant messages (count tool_use occurrences)

userStories.title: Create context aggregator utility
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to aggregate all 6 extractors into one call.
acceptanceCriteria: Export async function extractProjectContext(repoPath: string): Promise<ProjectContext>
Call all 6 extractors in parallel using Promise.all()
Handle partial failures (some extractors may fail, others succeed)

userStories.title: Update Query Generator to accept ProjectContext
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to modify query generator to use project context.
acceptanceCriteria: Update src/skill-recommendation/query-generator.ts signature to accept context: ProjectContext
Update generateQueries() function to take context parameter
Pass context to OpenRouter API call
Maintain backward compatibility (context is optional, default to Phase 1 behavior)

userStories.title: Update Query Generator prompt with context
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to enhance the prompt to use context for better queries.
acceptanceCriteria: Include languages, frameworks, runtime, existing packages, recent themes in prompt
Request 3 diverse queries in JSON array format

userStories.title: Add context extraction to pipeline
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to wire up context extraction into the main pipeline.
acceptanceCriteria: Call extractProjectContext() at pipeline start (parallel with other initialization)
Handle extraction failures (log warning, continue with empty context)
Measure and log context extraction latency

userStories.title: Add duplicate filtering to skill aggregation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to filter out skills that already exist in the repo.
acceptanceCriteria: After aggregation, filter out skills whose name matches existingPackages

userStories.title: Update CLI to extract and pass context
userStories.description: As a user, I need CLI to automatically extract context without manual input.
acceptanceCriteria: Call extractProjectContext() from repo path (cwd or --repo flag)
Update usage messages to mention context is automatic
Handle context extraction errors gracefully (no breaking)
Verify CLI still works: bgng recommend skill "query"

userStories.title: Test context extraction with multiple repos
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify context extraction works across different project types.
acceptanceCriteria: Create test fixtures: TypeScript+React, Python+Django, Go, mixed monorepo, minimal project
Test each extractor independently on all fixtures
Test full context extraction (all 6 parallel) on all fixtures
Verify accuracy: languages > 90%, frameworks > 90%, runtime detection > 90%

userStories.title: E2E verification: context-aware recommendations
userStories.description: As a user, I need to verify that context makes recommendations better.
acceptanceCriteria: Run bgng recommend skill "testing" on a TypeScript+React project
Verify top 5 does NOT include: jest (if already installed), react, typescript
Verify top 5 includes React-specific testing tools (e.g., React Testing Library variants)
Compare with Phase 1: Phase 2 should have better relevance
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill to see UI

userStories.title: Update PRD and diagrams with Phase 2
userStories.description: As a team member, I need documentation of Phase 2 implementation.
acceptanceCriteria: Add session log extraction process diagram
